headline: 6 contracts catalogued across Ethereum; token, withdrawal recipient factory, split controllers, and credential NFT

findings.text: Etherscan search identified OBOL token (0x0B010000b7624eb9B3DfBC279673C76E9D29D5F7) and Obol Techne Credential NFT (0xfdb3986f0c97c3c92af3c318d7d2742d8f7ed8cc)
Docs reference contract deployments list but full URL not resolved from search results
No explicit audit PDF links found in per-protocol context; audit references exist in docs but specific links unresolved

GitHub ObolNetwork/obol-splits repo documents 4 mainnet-deployed contract addresses: ObolLidoSplit, ImmutableSplitControllerFactory, ImmutableSplitController, and OptimisticWithdrawalRecipientFactory (Holesky testnet)
Single chain (Ethereum mainnet) per protocol specification; no multi-chain variants surfaced
Factory contracts identified but child contract enumeration not performed (requires on-chain read API calls unavailable in discovery phase)
Role taxonomy applied: token, factory, withdrawal-recipient, split-controller, and credential-nft roles identified
All admin_addresses entries traced to fetched search results or GitHub documentation

rationale.verdict: Discovery catalogued 6 protocol contracts across Ethereum by walking the website, official docs, GitHub repository, and Etherscan search. Two governance/admin-related contracts (token, credential NFT) and four protocol infrastructure contracts (factories and controllers for withdrawal recipients and split distribution) are recorded. No deployed contracts documentation page was fully accessible, and factory child enumeration was deferred for subsequent evaluation slices.

evidence.shows: Protocol website confirms Obol builds distributed validator infrastructure and OBOL token is central to governance and incentives
OBOL Token (ERC-20) deployed at 0x0B010000b7624eb9B3DfBC279673C76E9D29D5F7 with AccessControl and ERC20Votes

Obol Splits smart contracts repository listing mainnet deployments: ObolLidoSplit (0x2fB59065F049e0D0E3180C6312FA0FeB5Bbf0FE3), ImmutableSplitControllerFactory (0x49e7cA187F1E94d9A0d1DFBd6CCCd69Ca17F56a4), ImmutableSplitController (0xaF129979b773374dD3025d3F97353e73B0A6Cc8d), OptimisticWithdrawalRecipientFactory on Holesky (0x5754C8665B7e7BF15E83fCdF6d9636684B782b12)
Obol Techne Credential NFT contract (ERC721-like) at 0xfdb3986f0c97c3c92af3c318d7d2742d8f7ed8cc with owner 0x6f009873B617Bb8A442d1Ad99188cd2c6B8af1CA
Official confirmation that OBOL Token contract is 0x0B010000b7624eb9B3DfBC279673C76E9D29D5F7 and official Uniswap pool

unknowns: D2: Deployed contracts documentation page URL not fully resolved from search results (docs reference 'A list of the contract deployments can be found here' but link target unresolved)
D3: No audit PDF links in per-protocol context; docs reference audits but specific firm/date/URL not extracted
D4: GitHub deployment artifacts (broadcast/ or deployments/ directories) not walked due to tool limitations; only README contract listings extracted
D6: Factory children enumeration deferred; no on-chain read API calls performed in discovery phase
D5: Ethereum-only protocol per specification; multi-chain status unknown

protocol_metadata.about: Obol is a distributed validator technology (DVT) middleware for Ethereum that enables multiple independent node operators to jointly run a single validator in a fault-tolerant manner. The protocol includes the Charon middleware client, Distributed Validator Launchpad, Obol Splits contracts for reward distribution, and the OBOL governance token. Obol Distributed Validators are deployed across major staking protocols including Lido, EigenLayer, and EtherFi, securing approximately $1 billion in stake.
